programs.name: Early French Immersion
programs.description: K-7 program where BC curriculum is instructed in French from kindergarten to end of Grade 3, and Grades 4-7 50-80% of curriculum taught in French.

programs.name: Early French Immersion
programs.description: Grades 6-7 only. No K-5 enrolment for 2025-2026. BC curriculum instructed in French.

programs.name: Late French Immersion

programs.name: Early Mandarin Bilingual
programs.description: K-7 language instruction program where children learn and study in Mandarin for 50% of the day and English for 50%.

programs.name: Mandarin Bilingual
programs.description: Grades 4-7 full-day program. Core curriculum taught in English with Mandarin taught through Mandarin Language Arts.

programs.name: Indigenous Focus School
programs.description: K-7 district choice program for Indigenous and non-Indigenous Vancouver students. Curriculum emphasizes respect for local First Nations, Indigenous peoples' values, histories, and shared worldviews. Named 'Xpey'' (cedar in Musqueam) gifted by Musqueam in 2018.

programs.name: Fine Arts Program
programs.description: K-7 district program emphasizing visual arts, dance, music, and process drama. Approximately one-third of weekly curriculum is arts instruction taught by specialists.

programs.name: Montessori
programs.description: K-7 Montessori alternative program emphasizing child-centered, developmentally appropriate, hands-on learning with independence and self-motivation.

programs.name: Montessori
programs.description: K-7 Montessori alternative program emphasizing child-centered, developmentally appropriate, hands-on learning with independence and self-motivation.

programs.name: Montessori
programs.description: K-7 Montessori alternative program emphasizing child-centered, developmentally appropriate, hands-on learning with independence and self-motivation. 22 Kindergarten spots and 24 Grade 1 spots available.

programs.name: Intensive French
programs.description: Grades 6-7 district program. Students receive ~80% instruction in French September-January, then ~20% February-June. Math taught in English year-round. Develops oral skills equivalent to Grade 11 core French.

programs.name: International Baccalaureate - Primary Years Programme (PYP)
programs.description: K-7 inquiry-based, transdisciplinary IB programme fostering development of the whole child. Emphasizes international-mindedness, personal values, and independent learning. No external IB examinations.

programs.name: International Baccalaureate - Middle Years Programme (MYP)
programs.description: Grades 6-7 IB MYP program. Note: VSB voted to discontinue MYP effective June 27, 2025.

programs.name: International Baccalaureate - Middle Years Programme (MYP)
programs.description: Grades 6-7 IB MYP program. Note: VSB voted to discontinue MYP effective June 27, 2025.

programs.name: French Immersion (Secondary)
programs.description: Grades 8-12 continuation of elementary French Immersion. Early Immersion students continue at least half the school day in French. Requires completion of elementary French Immersion program.

programs.name: International Baccalaureate - Diploma Programme
programs.description: Grades 10-12 IB Diploma Programme. Two-year program (Grades 11-12) focusing on enrichment and learning skills for post-secondary. Students study six subjects plus programme core. Offered since 1983.
